title: Mandatory Publishing, Returns, Alternate Exchanges, and Route Audits · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed handoff reconstructs mandatory publishing, returns, alternate exchanges, and route audits from bounded publish, route, delivery, acknowledgement, and recovery evidence, challenges one misconception, and revises the unroutable publication detection and ownership record. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for unroutable publication detection and ownership record after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal d…
objectives: Register return handling before mandatory publication and correlate returned content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.
Distinguish broker confirms from consumer processing and combine mandatory returns or alternate routing with confirm results.
Build topology fixtures that assert expected destination sets, forbidden routes, unroutable cases, permissions, and changed bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Mandatory Return Sequence
steps.instruction:
Order the Mandatory Return Sequence RabbitMQ and TypeScript HTTP evidence cycle for this review task before implementing it.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Retrieve the complete evidence cycle · Review Mandatory Return Sequence.

content.text: A review messaging team handles case 8491 in a multi-tenant case event backbone with three subscriber responsibilities. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to keep mandatory return, alternate custody, confirmation, and route uncertainty separate; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then reuse one message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Register return handling before mandatory publication and correlate returned content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.
